about.description:
Electronic Engineering graduate specializing in automation and smart systems, with a strong foundation in microcontrollers, PLCs, and IoT technologies. 
      Skilled in system integration, HMI development, and industrial troubleshooting, with a proven ability to transform technical concepts into practical and reliable solutions. Passionate about innovation, continuous improvement, and engineering excellence..
